sections.sectionTitle: Biakinn Kininsak: Pasian' Huh ding Ngetna

verses.text: Pasian aw, na luah gamsungah dawibiate hong pai uh hi. Amaute in na biakinn siangtho ninsak gawp uh a, Jerusalem khuapi siasak gawp khin uh hi
Amaute in, na nasemte' luanghawmte huihlak vasate pia uh a, na mi siangthote' sate leilak ganhingte a pia uh hi
Amaute in Jerusalem kimkotah tui buakkhiat bangin amaute' sisan buakhia uh a, amaute a vui ding kuamah omlo hi
Kote pen ka vengte uh' zahko, ka kiim uha omte in a hong ko a hong nuihsat ka suak khinta uh hi
Topa aw, bang tanvei hi ding ahi hiam? Heh paisuak ding na hi hiam? Nangma hazat hehna meikuang bangin kuang paisuak ding ahi hiam
Nangmah a hong theilo minamte tung leh, nangma tungah thu a hong ngenlo kumpi gamte tungah hehgawp in
Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in ka mite uh thatmang khin uh a, ka gamsung khempeuh uh susiagawp khin uh hi
Ka pu ka pate uh mawhna hangin ko a suanlekhakte hong lang ngaihsut kei in la, hong kiniamkoih ahih manin kote a huh dingin na hehpihna hong paisak mengmeng in
Kote a hong honkhia Pasian aw, nangma min a than'na dingin kote hong huhin, nangma min hangin kote hong khahkhia-in, ka mawhnate uh hong maisak ta in
“Amaute' Pasian koi-ah om ahi hiam?” minam dangte in a cih ding kilawm ding ahi hiam? Na nasemte' sisan luangkhia a phulakna pen, minam dangte' lak, komau' muhna-ah kitheisak in
Thongkiate' tauna ngai in la, thah dingin a kisehte na vangliatna tawh kizui-in suaktasak in
Amaute in nang hong zahkona mah tawh ka vengte uh' ang sungah a zah sagihin thuk in, Topa
Tua ciangin nangma mi, nangma gamsung tuu kote in nangma tungah lungdamna kong lak ngitnget ding uh a, a khang khangin nangmah phatnate ka gengen ding uh hi.
